name: Asus Prime B550-Plus AM4 AMD Motherboard
highlights: AMD AM4 socket: Ready for Ryzen™ 5000 Series/ 4000 G-Series/ 3000 Series Desktop Processors
Ultrafast connectivity: Dual M.2, PCIe 4.0, 1 Gb Ethernet, USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A and Type-C
Comprehensive cooling: VRM heatsinks, PCH heatsink, and Fan Xpert 4
Aura Sync RGB: Onboard addressable Gen 2 header for RGB LED strips, easily synced with Aura Sync-capable hardware
